CustomField.formula: IF( CONTAINS(LOWER(CreatedBy.Title), "customer success manager"), "CSM", IF( CONTAINS(LOWER(CreatedBy.Title), "customer experience manager"), "CEM", IF( CONTAINS(LOWER(CreatedBy.Title), "field consultant"), "PS", IF( CONTAINS(LOWER(CreatedBy.Title), "renewals"), "Renewals", IF( CONTAINS(LOWER(CreatedBy.Title), "customer success engineer"), "Support", IF( CONTAINS(LOWER(CreatedBy.Title), "account executive"), "Account Team", "Other" ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Created Team
